units.title: Partnership Accounts
units.description: Fundamentals of Partnership. Reconstitution of a Partnership Firm. Dissolution of Partnership.

units.title: Company Accounts
units.description: Accounting for Share Capital. Issue and Redemption of Debentures.

units.title: Financial Statement Analysis
units.description: Analysis of Financial Statements. Accounting Ratios. Cash Flow Statement.

units.title: Principles and Functions of Management
units.description: Nature and Significance of Management. Principles of Management. Business Environment. Planning. Organising. Staffing. Directing. Controlling.

units.title: Business Finance and Marketing
units.description: Financial Management. Financial Markets. Marketing Management. Consumer Protection. Entrepreneurship Development.

units.title: Introductory Macroeconomics
units.description: National Income Accounting. Money and Banking. Determination of Income and Employment. Government Budget and the Economy. Balance of Payments.

units.title: Indian Economic Development
units.description: Development Experience (1947-90). Economic Reforms since 1991. Current Challenges Facing Indian Economy.
